hero.title: About Waste Management Services
hero.subtitle: A modern, fully licensed waste carrier on a mission to make responsible waste removal simple for everyone.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.content: Waste Management Services is a fully licensed waste management company serving residential and commercial customers across the UK. We provide skip hire, cage van collections, hazardous waste removal, demolition and portaloo hire — all bookable online in minutes.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: We're committed to a cleaner, greener tomorrow. With a zero-to-landfill ambition and 98% of collected waste recycled, we help our customers dispose of waste responsibly while keeping the process simple and affordable.

sections.title: Why Customers Trust Us
sections.content: Thousands of homeowners, builders and businesses rely on us for transparent pricing, fast and reliable service, and fully compliant disposal. Our modern booking platform and friendly support team make every job effortless.

values.title: Sustainability
values.text: We divert 98% of waste from landfill and continually improve our recycling rates.

values.title: Compliance
values.text: Fully licensed and insured, with complete waste transfer documentation.

values.title: Customer First
values.text: Clear pricing, simple booking and responsive support on every job.

values.title: Reliability
values.text: Same-day and next-day availability you can depend on.
